name: loom-works
description: Lane / Task management with coupled documentation lifecycle

project_mode.title: Project mode
project_mode.description: repo | no-repo. Leave empty to auto-detect via git rev-parse.

doc_folder_name.title: Docs folder name
doc_folder_name.description: Folder for tasks.md, tasks/, reference/, current-task.md. Default: docs

on_lane_spawned_hook.title: On lane spawned hook
on_lane_spawned_hook.description: Path relative to project root, executed once after spawn-lane on the lane worktree root. Empty = noop. $1 = CWD = lane root. Env: LOOM_LANE, LOOM_WORKTREE, LOOM_PROJECT_ROOT.
